framework.name: CFCS Secure Software Development Guidance
framework.scope: Guidance for secure software development practices in Danish organizations
framework.structure_description: Guidance organized by secure development domains: secure SDLC, secure coding, code review and testing, secure CI/CD, and vulnerability management.

controls.title: Secure software development lifecycle (SSDLC)
controls.description: The organization must implement a secure software development lifecycle that integrates security in all phases from requirements to decommissioning.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere en sikker softwareudviklingslivscyklus der integrerer sikkerhed i alle faser fra krav til udfasning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Adopter en SSDLC-model baseret pa OWASP SAMM eller Microsoft SDL. Definer sikkerhedsaktiviteter for hver fase.

controls.title: Security requirements in specification
controls.description: Security requirements must be defined explicitly in the specification for all software projects based on threat modeling and risk assessment.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedskrav skal defineres eksplicit i kravspecifikationen for alle softwareprojekter baseret pa trusselsmodellering og risikovurdering.

controls.title: Threat modeling in design phase
controls.description: Threat modeling must be performed in the design phase to identify threats, attack surfaces, and the adequacy of the security architecture.
controls.description_nl: Trusselsmodellering skal udfoeres i designfasen for at identificere trusler, angrebsflader og sikkerhedsarkitekturens tilstraekkelighed.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend STRIDE eller tilsvarende metodik. Dokumenter trusler, modforanstaltninger og restrisici.

controls.title: Secure coding guidelines
controls.description: The organization must have documented secure coding guidelines covering input validation, output encoding, authentication, session management, and error handling.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have dokumenterede retningslinjer for sikker kodning der daekker input-validering, output-encoding, autentifikation, session-styring og fejlhandtering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Baser retningslinjerne pa OWASP Secure Coding Practices. Tilpas til organisationens teknologistak.

controls.title: Input validation and output encoding
controls.description: All user input must be validated on the server side. Output must be correctly encoded based on context to prevent injection attacks.
controls.description_nl: Al brugerinput skal valideres pa serversiden. Output skal encodes korrekt baseret pa konteksten for at forebygge injection-angreb.

controls.title: Secure authentication and session handling
controls.description: Applications must implement secure authentication with protection against brute force, credential stuffing, and session hijacking.
controls.description_nl: Applikationer skal implementere sikker autentifikation med beskyttelse mod brute force, credential stuffing og sessionkapring.

controls.title: Handling of secrets in code
controls.description: Passwords, API keys, and other secrets must never be hardcoded in source code. Use secrets vaults or environment variables.
controls.description_nl: Adgangskoder, API-noegler og andre hemmeligheder ma aldrig hardkodes i kildekoden. Anvend hemmeligheds-vaults eller miljoevariabler.

controls.title: Correct use of cryptography
controls.description: Developers must use established cryptographic libraries and algorithms. Homegrown encryption solutions are prohibited.
controls.description_nl: Udviklere skal anvende etablerede kryptografiske biblioteker og algoritmer. Hjemmelavede krypteringsloesninger er forbudt.

controls.title: Static code analysis (SAST)
controls.description: All code must be scanned with static analysis tools (SAST) as part of the CI/CD pipeline. Critical findings must block deployment.
controls.description_nl: Al kode skal scannes med statiske analysevaerktojer (SAST) som del af CI/CD-pipelinen. Kritiske fund skal blokere deployment.
controls.implementation_guidance: Integrer SAST i pull request-processen. Definer kvalitetsgates baseret pa sarbarhedens alvorsgrad.

controls.title: Dynamic application testing (DAST)
controls.description: Web applications must be tested with DAST tools in the staging environment before production deployment.
controls.description_nl: Webapplikationer skal testes med DAST-vaerktojer i staging-miljoeet foer produktionsudrulning.

controls.title: Software Composition Analysis (SCA)
controls.description: Third-party dependencies must be scanned for known vulnerabilities with SCA tools. Critical vulnerabilities must be remediated before release.
controls.description_nl: Tredjepartsafhaengigheder skal scannes for kendte sarbarheder med SCA-vaerktojer. Kritiske sarbarheder skal udbedres inden release.

controls.title: Security-focused code review
controls.description: All code changes must undergo peer review with a focus on security before merging to the main branch.
controls.description_nl: Alle kodeaendringer skal gennemga peer review med fokus pa sikkerhed foer merge til hovedgrenen.

controls.title: Penetration testing of applications
controls.description: Critical applications must undergo penetration testing by qualified testers at least annually and after significant changes.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske applikationer skal underkastes penetrationstest af kvalificerede testere mindst arligt og efter vesentlige aendringer.

controls.title: Security in CI/CD pipeline
controls.description: The CI/CD pipeline must be protected against tampering with access control, signed artifacts, and audit logging of all actions.
controls.description_nl: CI/CD-pipelinen skal beskyttes mod manipulation med adgangskontrol, signerede artefakter og audit-logning af alle handlinger.

controls.title: Automated security gates
controls.description: The CI/CD pipeline must have automated security gates that prevent deployment of code with critical vulnerabilities.
controls.description_nl: CI/CD-pipelinen skal have automatiserede sikkerhedsgates der forhindrer deployment af kode med kritiske sarbarheder.

controls.title: Signing of build artifacts
controls.description: Build artifacts including container images must be digitally signed to ensure integrity from build to deployment.
controls.description_nl: Build-artefakter inklusiv container-images skal signeres digitalt for at sikre integritet fra build til deployment.

controls.title: Responsible vulnerability disclosure
controls.description: The organization must have a public policy and contact channel for responsible vulnerability disclosure (security.txt).
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en offentlig politik og kontaktkanal for ansvarlig saerbarhedsrapportering (security.txt).
controls.implementation_guidance: Opret security.txt-fil pa webapplikationer. Definer tidsrammer for bekraeftelse og udbedring.

controls.title: Security updates of dependencies
controls.description: Dependencies with known vulnerabilities must be updated within defined timeframes based on CVSS severity.
controls.description_nl: Afhaengigheder med kendte sarbarheder skal opdateres inden for definerede tidsrammer baseret pa CVSS-alvorsgrad.
